title: Peekaboo Planet
short_description: A colourful, tranquil planet of hidden creatures for children to discover — then take the fun outdoors.
description: Explore a colourful, tranquil planet full of all kinds of creatures just waiting to be discovered: a grumpy badger who just wants to be left alone to read; a high-kicking fox hiding by the hen-house; a curled-up hedgehog ready to spring from a pile of fallen leaves; and a whole menagerie more. Encourage your children to find the hidden beasts, then why not go and explore the real world on your doorstep!
